title: AWS vs Azure vs GCP — Which Cloud Should You Learn in 2025?
excerpt: Three clouds dominate the market. Choosing the wrong one to learn first can cost you months. Here is the data-driven answer for 2025.
coverImageAlt: AWS vs Azure vs Google Cloud 2025 Comparison — ArivuOn Academy

seo.metaTitle: AWS vs Azure vs GCP 2025 — Which Cloud to Learn First? | ArivuOn Academy
seo.metaDescription: Comparing AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud in 2025. Market share, job demand, salary data, and which one to learn first — explained by ArivuOn Academy.

content.text: Every cloud learner faces this question: AWS, Azure, or GCP? Choose wrong and you spend months learning a platform with fewer job openings. Choose right and your skills are immediately marketable. Here is the honest, data-backed breakdown.

AWS holds 31% of the cloud market. Azure holds 25%. Google Cloud holds 11%. The remaining 33% is split across hundreds of smaller providers. AWS has been the market leader for 12 years. Azure grew aggressively because Microsoft already has enterprise relationships. GCP grew because of Google's AI/ML capabilities, specifically with TensorFlow and Vertex AI.

content.title: The Short Answer
content.text: Learn AWS first. It has the most job openings, the most learning resources, the most community support, and it is the default choice for startups globally. Azure is the right choice only if you are targeting enterprise Microsoft-stack companies. GCP is the right choice only if you are targeting AI/ML roles.

On LinkedIn India today, searching 'AWS' returns 3x more job postings than 'Azure' and 8x more than 'GCP'. Globally on Indeed, AWS certifications appear in twice as many job requirements as Azure certifications. For someone entering the job market, AWS is the clear choice for maximum optionality.

items.question: Is AWS certification worth it in 2025?
items.answer: AWS certifications are among the highest-ROI certifications in tech. The AWS Solutions Architect Associate is consistently listed as one of the top 5 highest-paying IT certifications globally. Combined with real project experience, it significantly increases interview chances.

items.question: Can I learn multiple clouds at once?
items.answer: Do not. The concepts transfer (VMs, storage, networking, IAM are universal) but the interfaces, CLI tools, and specific services are all different. Master one cloud first, then a second cloud takes 20% of the time.

items.question: Which cloud is best for DevOps?
items.answer: AWS has the most mature DevOps tooling ecosystem — CodePipeline, CodeBuild, ECS, EKS, CloudFormation, and seamless integration with Jenkins and Terraform. For DevOps specifically, AWS is the industry standard.
